subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-25
subcodes.first_line: When the Muslims arrested the leader of the Zoroastrians and flogged him for drinking wine, under the whip he cried,
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی مسلمین رئیس موبدان را بسبب خوردن شراب بتازیانه بستند و زیر تازیانه نعره میزد و می گفت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
